description: All-stages option and TD stages for a selected well.
sql:
SELECT * FROM (
SELECT '-1' AS value, 'Select stage' AS label, 0 AS sort_order
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT CAST(stage_num_td AS TEXT) AS value, CAST(stage_num_td AS TEXT) AS label, 1 AS sort_order
FROM featurestore:merged_platinum_labels_v1
WHERE name = :well_name
  AND CAST(:well_name AS TEXT) NOT IN ('', '__ALL__')
  AND stage_num_td IS NOT NULL
  AND substage IS NOT NULL
  AND LOWER(substage) <> 'na'
ORDER BY sort_order, value
) q
